scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy frontend/dist
scripts.db:init:local: wrangler d1 execute vagtplan-db --local --file=./db/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute vagtplan-db --local --file=./db/seed.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: wrangler d1 execute vagtplan-db --remote --file=./db/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute vagtplan-db --remote --file=./db/seed.sql
